equals lower bond yields and flat to up

the only thing that's going to impact
asset markets right now right if you
think about the four major cycles that
you need to get right as an investor any
given time it's growth it's inflation
it's policy both monetary and fiscal and
it's also liquidity that we're talking
about specifically liquidity liquidity
can overwhelm the other Cycles at times
but the other Cycles can overwhelm the
liquidity cycle at times right if we go
into recession you know all your
thoughts about liquidity are going to go
by the wayside if we have a significant
acceleration liquidity any concerns
about a you know mod slow down in the
economy uh will go by the way side you
have a significant acceleration
inflation people are going to start to
get concerned about growth and they're
going to start to get concerned about
liquidity uh and then obviously if you
have a significant retrenchment of
fiscal policy then they can become very
concerned about growth but it could also
be sometimes positive for liquidity so
they're all interconnected they all are
reflexive and they all interplay with
each other in asset markets so it's our
job as investors one of the most
important jobs we have as investors is
to understand what is the market
currently trying to price in in the
context of those
each of those Cycles is always going to
be doing whatever it's doing at any
given time but the market is you know I
don't want to say add might be too I
don't know if I get trouble saying this
but like the market is ADD so like start
not add the market has a very small
amount of focus its focus budget is very
small it can only kind of focus on one
or two main things at any given time so
it's our job as investors is to figure

market is trying to price in and
ultimately what are the things that are
changing that the market isn't focused
